goal: Integrate AST-based static analysis into wfc-review to provide reviewers with supplemental context
context: Token optimization - 97% reduction (8000 → 200 tokens per file) while providing better context than raw file content
users: WFC reviewers (5 specialist agents: Security, Correctness, Performance, Maintainability, Reliability)
core_features: AST metrics extraction (complexity, dangerous calls, nesting depth)
Shared cache file (.ast-context.json) for all reviewers
Pre-review hook integration (before reviewer agents spawn)
Fail-open error handling (parsing failures don't block reviews)

constraints.philosophy: Metrics are supplemental hints, not replacement for code review

success_criteria: Zero false negatives (parsing failures don't block reviews)

safety: Parse failures must not block review (PROP-002)
AST analyzer must exclude development artifacts (PROP-006)
liveness: AST cache file must exist before reviewers spawn (PROP-004)
invariant: Reviewer prompts must include AST disclaimers (PROP-005)
performance: AST analysis overhead must be <5% of review time (PROP-003)
